overview: Processes Microsoft Office documents from Office 2007 and later, including DOCX (Word), XLSX (Excel), and PPTX (PowerPoint). These documents use the OpenXML (ZIP-based) format, as opposed to the binary formats used by pre-2007 versions of Office. The filter provides format-specific extraction options for each document type, with support for comments, hidden content, document properties, charts, diagrams, and color-based exclusion.

word.translateHeadersFooters.help: Exposes header and footer content from Word documents for translation.

word.translateHidden.help: Exposes hidden text in Word documents for translation. Also extracts text that was excluded via highlight color settings when this is enabled.
notes: Text excluded using the highlight color mechanism is treated as hidden — this option will extract it.

word.translateComments.help: Exposes document comments in Word for translation.

word.translateDocProperties.help: Exposes the following document properties for translation: **title**, **subject**, **creator**, **description**, **category**, **keywords**, **content status**.

word.excludeGraphicMetaData.help: When enabled, `@name` and `@descr` attribute values associated with drawings and word art are **not** exposed for translation. The individual `translateWordGraphicName` and `translateWordGraphicDescription` options provide finer-grained control.

word.excludeColors.help: Enables font colour-based exclusion for Word content. Text using any selected colours will not be exposed for translation.

word.allowStyleOptimisation.help: Allows optimization of styles — common formatting of all runs in a paragraph is moved to the styles part of the document. This can simplify the tag structure of extracted segments.

word.translateNumberingLevelText.help: Exposes numbering-level text (e.g., list bullet/number format strings) for translation.

word.ignoreFontColors.help: Ignores font colours during processing. When combined with **Clean Tags Aggressively** and empty ignorance thresholds, font colour run properties are **permanently removed from the document structure** on filtering — meaning font colour information will also be absent on merge.
notes: If both `aggressiveCleanup` and this option are enabled with empty thresholds, font colour properties are removed from the document. This removal is irreversible on merge.

dependsOn.condition: when both are enabled with empty thresholds, font colour properties are permanently removed

word.fontColorsMin.help: Font colours are ignored starting from this threshold value. When empty, defaults to white.
word.fontColorsMin.values: Accepts **preset colour names** (`black`, `Black`) or **RGB hex strings** (`000000`). Example: `000000` means threshold starts at black.

dependsOn.condition: must be enabled for thresholds to apply

word.fontColorsMax.help: Font colours are ignored up to this threshold value. When empty, defaults to white.
word.fontColorsMax.values: Accepts **preset colour names** (`white`, `White`) or **RGB hex strings** (`FFFFFF`). Example: `FFFFFF` means threshold ends at white.

dependsOn.condition: must be enabled for thresholds to apply

word.automaticallyAcceptRevisions.help: Automatically accepts tracked changes (revisions) in Word documents before processing.

translateWordGraphicName.help: Exposes `@name` attribute values associated with drawings and word art in Word documents for translation.

translateWordGraphicDescription.help: Exposes `@descr` attribute values associated with drawings and word art in Word documents for translation.

excel.translateHidden.help: Exposes hidden rows and columns in Excel spreadsheets for translation.

excel.translateSheetNames.help: Exposes worksheet tab names in Excel workbooks for translation.

excel.translateDrawings.help: Exposes text content from shapes and drawings in Excel for translation.

excel.translateDiagramData.help: Exposes SmartArt and other diagram data in Excel for translation.

excel.excludeColors.help: Excludes cells with a foreground or background color matching any selected colors from translation. The named colors available in the UI correspond to the **standard Excel 2010 color palette**.
notes: Colors not listed in the UI can be excluded by modifying the `tsExcelExcludedColors` section of the configuration file with RGB hex values in `RRGGBB` format.
examples:
To exclude Pantone 292 (#69b3e7), add to config:
```
tsExcelExcludedColors.i=1
ccc0=69b3e7
```

excel.translateCellsCopied.help: Cell data are copied on extraction to allow **contextualised and independent translations** of each cell.

excel.preserveStylesInTargetColumns.help: Preserves the existing cell styles in target columns rather than overwriting them with source column styles.

extractExcelSourceAndTargetColumnsJoined.help: Joins source and target columns (cells in a row) during extraction rather than extracting them separately.

extractExcelWorksheetsExplicitlySpecifie.help: Only worksheets whose names match a pattern in the **Worksheet Configurations** are extracted. All other worksheets are ignored.

extractExcelCellsExplicitlySpecified.help: Only cells specified in the **Worksheet Configurations** are extracted. The explicitly mentioned source and target columns are eligible for this handling.

treatExcelSourceColumnStylesForExclusion.help: Applies source column cell styles when evaluating color-based exclusion rules.

powerpoint.translateHidden.help: Exposes hidden slides in PowerPoint presentations for translation.

powerpoint.translateMasters.help: Exposes slide masters and notes masters for translation. Also exposes content from **layouts currently in use** by at least one slide.

powerpoint.translateNotes.help: Exposes speaker notes attached to slides for translation.

powerpoint.translateCharts.help: Exposes chart text content in PowerPoint for translation.

powerpoint.translateComments.help: Exposes slide comments for translation. Both this option **and** the General Options **Translate Comments** must be enabled.
notes: Currently coupled with the General Options comment setting — both must be checked. These will be separated in a future release.

dependsOn.condition: currently coupled — both must be enabled for PowerPoint comments to be extracted

powerpoint.translateDocProperties.help: Exposes PowerPoint document properties (title, subject, creator, description, category, keywords, content status) for translation. Both this option **and** the General Options **Translate Document Properties** must be enabled.
notes: Currently coupled with the General Options doc properties setting — both must be checked. These will be separated in a future release.

dependsOn.condition: currently coupled — both must be enabled for PowerPoint doc properties to be extracted

powerpoint.translateDiagramData.help: Exposes SmartArt and other diagram data in PowerPoint for translation.

powerpoint.includedSlideNumbersOnly.help: Restricts extraction to only specific slide numbers rather than all slides in the presentation.

powerpoint.ignorePlaceholdersInMasters.help: Ignores placeholder elements in slide masters, preventing their content from being extracted for translation.

powerpoint.reorderNotes.help: Reorders note parts to be placed **after the related slide part** and after its chart parts. Useful for controlling the order of parts in the output ZIP archive.

powerpoint.reorderCharts.help: Reorders chart parts to be placed **after the related slide/layout/master part** and after their diagram data parts.

powerpoint.reorderComments.help: Reorders comment parts to be placed **after the related slide part** and after its note parts.

powerpoint.reorderDiagramData.help: Reorders diagram data parts to be placed **after the related slide/layout/master part** and after their relationship parts.

powerpoint.reorderDocProperties.help: Reorders document properties to be placed **after the root relationship part** (`_rels/.rels`).

powerpoint.reorderRelationships.help: Reorders relationship parts to be placed **after the related slide/layout/master part**.

powerpoint.reorderNotesAndComments.help: Reorders both notes and comments together, placing them after their related slide parts.

translatePowerpointGraphicName.help: Exposes `@name` attribute values associated with drawings and word art in PowerPoint for translation.

translatePowerpointGraphicDescription.help: Exposes `@descr` attribute values associated with drawings and word art in PowerPoint for translation.

translatePowerpointCachedChartStrings.help: Exposes cached chart string values in PowerPoint for translation. These are the pre-rendered text values stored in chart XML.

translatePowerpointCachedChartNumbers.help: Exposes cached chart numbers and format codes in PowerPoint for translation.

removeEmbeddedExcel.help: Removes the embedded Excel package from the document, along with any references to it in chart parts and related relationships.

dependsOn.condition: at least one of cachedChartStrings or cachedChartNumbers must be enabled
at least one of cachedChartStrings or cachedChartNumbers must be enabled

general.aggressiveCleanup.help: Strips additional formatting tags related to text spacing. Improves filtering quality when Office documents were **converted from other formats** (particularly PDF), where imperfect conversion adds extra formatting noise.

ignoreWhitespaceStyles.help: Whitespace character styles (formatting) are ignored and considered equal to the consequential ones during tag cleanup.

dependsOn.condition: must be enabled for this option to take effect

preserveAsciiAndHighAnsiFontCategoriesOn.help: Preserves the ASCII and HighAnsi run font categories when merging consequential runs. Relevant when aggressive cleanup is used and font category preservation matters for output fidelity.

general.extractExternalHyperlinks.help: Exposes external hyperlink URLs for translation.

general.inExcludeMode.help:
Controls the style-based include/exclude mechanism.
- **Exclude** mode: text with specified styles is skipped
- **Include** mode: only text with specified styles is extracted

general.inExcludeHighlightMode.help:
Controls the highlight-color-based include/exclude mechanism.
- **Include**: only text with specified highlight colors is extracted
- **Exclude**: all content except text with specified highlight colors is extracted

Default: Exclude with no colors selected (all visible content extracted).
notes: Text excluded via highlight colors is treated as **hidden** — enabling "Translate Hidden" options will still extract it.
Starting in 1.48.0, this option also applies to PowerPoint content in addition to Word.

general.addLineSeparator.help: Adds line separator characters (instead of inline codes) for line breaks within paragraphs.

general.addTabAsCharacter.help: Adds tab characters (instead of inline codes) for tabs within text runs.

general.allowEmptyTargets.help: Allows empty target segments during merge. Without this, empty targets may be skipped or filled with source text.

general.ignoreSoftHyphenTag.help: Ignores soft hyphen tags in the document, removing them from extracted content.

general.replaceNoBreakHyphenTag.help: Replaces no-break hyphen tags with actual no-break hyphen characters.

general.lineSeparatorReplacement.help: The string used to replace line separator elements in the output.
general.lineSeparatorReplacement.values: A replacement string. Default is `\n` (newline character).

general.maxAttributeSize.help: Maximum size in bytes for XML attributes in the document. Increase if processing documents with very large embedded data in attributes.
general.maxAttributeSize.values: Integer value in bytes. Default: `4194304` (4 MB).

general.fileType.help: Identifies the type of Office document being processed. Normally set automatically based on file extension. Only needs manual configuration in special cases.
general.fileType.values: `MSWORD` — Word documents, `MSEXCEL` — Excel spreadsheets, `MSWORDDOCPROPERTIES` — Word doc properties only, `MSPOWERPOINTCOMMENTS` — PowerPoint comments only.

limitations: Various known issues tracked in the [Okapi Bitbucket issue tracker](https://bitbucket.org/okapiframework/okapi/issues?status=new&title=~OpenXML).
Pre-2007 binary Office formats (`.doc`, `.xls`, `.ppt`) are **not** supported — only OpenXML (`.docx`, `.xlsx`, `.pptx`, etc.).
PowerPoint `translateComments` and `translateDocProperties` are currently coupled with the General Options equivalents — both must be enabled to extract these elements.
processingNotes: The filter processes OpenXML (ZIP-based) Office documents by extracting and processing individual XML parts within the archive.
The highlight-color include/exclude mechanism treats excluded text as hidden, so "Translate Hidden" options can override highlight-based exclusions.
Starting in 1.48.0, Word highlight color exclusion/inclusion also applies to PowerPoint content.
Excel worksheet configurations use `java.util.regex.Pattern` syntax for name patterns, and ALPHA-26 notation (A, B, C…) for column references.
Colors in Excel exclusion support both named UI colors (standard Excel 2010 palette) and custom RGB hex values (`RRGGBB` format) via manual config file editing.

examples.title: Excel worksheet configuration with source/target columns
examples.description: Configure extraction to translate column A into column B, excluding header rows 1-2 and columns C-D from a specific worksheet named `Sheet1`.

examples.title: Excel worksheet configuration with metadata
examples.description: Configure extraction to translate columns A and B, treat column D as row-level metadata, rows 1-2 as column metadata headers, exclude row 5, and skip column C entirely.

examples.title: Excluding custom Excel colors by RGB
examples.description: Exclude a specific color (Pantone 292 / #69b3e7) not available in the standard UI palette by editing the configuration file directly.

ignoreWhitespaceStyles.title: Ignore Whitespace Styles
ignoreWhitespaceStyles.description: Ignore whitespace character formatting and treat it as equivalent to consequential styles during aggressive tag cleanup.

preserveAsciiAndHighAnsiFontCategoriesOn.title: Preserve Font Categories on Detection
preserveAsciiAndHighAnsiFontCategoriesOn.description: Preserve ASCII and HighAnsi run font categories when merging consequential runs.

removeEmbeddedExcel.title: Remove Embedded Excel Package
removeEmbeddedExcel.description: Remove the embedded Excel data package and its references from chart parts when extracting cached chart values.

translateWordGraphicName.title: Translate Word Graphic Names
translateWordGraphicName.description: Expose @name attributes of drawings and word art in Word documents for translation.

translateWordGraphicDescription.title: Translate Word Graphic Descriptions
translateWordGraphicDescription.description: Expose @descr attributes of drawings and word art in Word documents for translation.

translatePowerpointGraphicName.title: Translate PowerPoint Graphic Names
translatePowerpointGraphicName.description: Expose @name attributes of drawings and word art in PowerPoint presentations for translation.

translatePowerpointGraphicDescription.title: Translate PowerPoint Graphic Descriptions
translatePowerpointGraphicDescription.description: Expose @descr attributes of drawings and word art in PowerPoint presentations for translation.

translatePowerpointCachedChartStrings.title: Translate Cached Chart Strings
translatePowerpointCachedChartStrings.description: Expose pre-rendered chart string values stored in PowerPoint chart XML for translation.

translatePowerpointCachedChartNumbers.title: Translate Cached Chart Numbers
translatePowerpointCachedChartNumbers.description: Expose cached chart numbers and format codes in PowerPoint for translation.

treatExcelSourceColumnStylesForExclusion.title: Apply Source Column Styles for Exclusion
treatExcelSourceColumnStylesForExclusion.description: Use source column cell styles when evaluating color-based exclusion rules in Excel.

extractExcelSourceAndTargetColumnsJoined.title: Join Source and Target Columns
extractExcelSourceAndTargetColumnsJoined.description: Join source and target columns in a row during extraction rather than extracting them separately.

extractExcelWorksheetsExplicitlySpecifie.title: Extract Only Specified Worksheets
extractExcelWorksheetsExplicitlySpecifie.description: Only extract worksheets whose names match patterns defined in the Worksheet Configurations.

extractExcelCellsExplicitlySpecified.title: Extract Only Specified Cells
extractExcelCellsExplicitlySpecified.description: Only extract cells explicitly specified in the Worksheet Configurations.

fullDoc:
# OpenXML (Microsoft Office) Filter

Processes Microsoft Office documents from Office 2007 and later, including DOCX (Word), XLSX (Excel), and PPTX (PowerPoint). These documents use the OpenXML (ZIP-based) format, as opposed to the binary formats used by pre-2007 versions of Office. The filter provides format-specific extraction options for each document type, with support for comments, hidden content, document properties, charts, diagrams, and color-based exclusion.

Supported extensions: `.docx`, `.docm`, `.dotx`, `.dotm`, `.pptx`, `.pptm`, `.ppsx`, `.ppsm`, `.potx`, `.potm`, `.xlsx`, `.xlsm`, `.xltx`, `.xltm`, `.vsdx`, `.vsdm`

## Parameters

### General Options

#### Aggressive Cleanup
Strips additional formatting tags related to text spacing. Improves filtering quality when Office documents were **converted from other formats** (particularly PDF), where imperfect conversion adds extra formatting noise.

#### Ignore Whitespace Styles
Whitespace character styles (formatting) are ignored and considered equal to the consequential ones during tag cleanup. Requires **Aggressive Cleanup** to be enabled.

#### Preserve Font Categories on Detection
Preserves the ASCII and HighAnsi run font categories when merging consequential runs.

#### Remove Embedded Excel Package
Removes the embedded Excel data package and its references from chart parts. Only relevant when cached chart strings or numbers are set for extraction.

#### Extract External Hyperlinks
Exposes external hyperlink URLs for translation.

#### Include/Exclude Mode (Styles)
Controls the style-based include/exclude mechanism. In **Exclude** mode, text with specified styles is skipped. In **Include** mode, only text with specified styles is extracted.

#### Include/Exclude Mode (Highlight Colors)
Controls the highlight-color-based include/exclude mechanism. In **Include** mode, only text with specified highlight colors is extracted. In **Exclude** mode, all content except highlighted text is extracted.

> **Note:** Text excluded via highlight colors is treated as hidden — enabling "Translate Hidden" options will still extract it.
> **Note:** Starting in 1.48.0, this option also applies to PowerPoint content.

#### Add Line Separator as Character
Adds line separator characters (instead of inline codes) for line breaks within paragraphs.

#### Add Tab as Character
Adds tab characters (instead of inline codes) for tabs within text runs.

#### Allow Empty Targets
Allows empty target segments during merge. Without this, empty targets may be skipped or filled with source text.

#### Ignore Soft Hyphen Tags
Ignores soft hyphen tags in the document, removing them from extracted content.

#### Replace No-Break Hyphen Tags
Replaces no-break hyphen tags with actual no-break hyphen characters.

#### Line Separator Replacement
The string used to replace line separator elements. Default: `\n`.

#### Max Attribute Size
Maximum size in bytes for XML attributes. Default: 4194304 (4 MB). Increase for documents with very large embedded attribute data.

#### File Type
Identifies the document type being processed: `MSWORD`, `MSEXCEL`, `MSWORDDOCPROPERTIES`, `MSPOWERPOINTCOMMENTS`. Normally set automatically by file extension.

### Word Options

#### Translate Headers and Footers
Exposes header and footer content for translation. Default: on.

#### Translate Hidden Text
Exposes hidden text for translation. Also extracts text excluded via highlight colors. Default: on.

#### Translate Comments
Exposes document comments for translation. Default: on.

#### Translate Document Properties
Exposes title, subject, creator, description, category, keywords, and content status for translation. Default: on.

#### Exclude Graphic Metadata
Excludes `@name` and `@descr` attributes of drawings and word art from extraction.

#### Translate Graphic Name
Exposes `@name` attribute values of drawings and word art for translation. Default: on.

#### Translate Graphic Description
Exposes `@descr` attribute values of drawings and word art for translation. Default: off.

#### Ignore Font Colors
Ignores font colours during processing. When combined with aggressive cleanup and empty thresholds, font colour properties are **permanently removed** from the document.

#### Font Colors Min Threshold
Font colours are ignored starting from this value. Accepts preset names (`black`) or RGB hex (`000000`). Empty defaults to white.

#### Font Colors Max Threshold
Font colours are ignored up to this value. Accepts preset names (`white`) or RGB hex (`FFFFFF`). Empty defaults to white.

#### Translate Numbering Level Text
Exposes numbering-level text (list format strings) for translation. Default: off.

#### Allow Style Optimisation
Common formatting of all runs in a paragraph is moved to the styles part. Default: on.

#### Automatically Accept Revisions
Accepts tracked changes before processing. Default: on.

### Excel Options

#### Translate Hidden
Exposes hidden rows and columns for translation. Default: off.

#### Translate Sheet Names
Exposes worksheet tab names for translation. Default: off.

#### Translate Drawings
Exposes text from shapes and drawings for translation. Default: off.

#### Translate Diagram Data
Exposes SmartArt and diagram data for translation. Default: off.

#### Exclude Colors
Excludes cells matching selected foreground/background colors. UI shows the standard Excel 2010 palette. Custom RGB values (`RRGGBB`) can be added by editing the `.fprm` config file.

#### Translate Cells Copied
Copies cell data on extraction for contextualised, independent translations. Default: on.

#### Preserve Styles in Target Columns
Preserves existing cell styles in target columns. Default: off.

#### Join Source and Target Columns
Joins source and target columns during extraction. Default: off.

#### Extract Only Specified Worksheets
Only extracts worksheets matching Worksheet Configuration name patterns. Default: off.

#### Extract Only Specified Cells
Only extracts cells specified in Worksheet Configurations. Default: off.

#### Apply Source Column Styles for Exclusion
Uses source column styles when evaluating color-based exclusion rules. Default: off.

### PowerPoint Options

#### Translate Hidden Slides
Exposes hidden slides for translation. Default: off.

#### Translate Masters
Exposes slide masters, notes masters, and layouts in use by at least one slide. Default: on.

#### Translate Notes
Exposes speaker notes for translation. Default: off.

#### Translate Charts
Exposes chart text for translation. Default: on.

#### Translate Comments
Exposes slide comments for translation. Currently coupled with the General Options comment setting — both must be enabled. Default: on.

#### Translate Document Properties
Exposes document properties for translation. Currently coupled with the General Options setting — both must be enabled. Default: on.

#### Translate Diagram Data
Exposes SmartArt and diagram data for translation. Default: on.

#### Translate Graphic Name / Description
Exposes `@name` and `@descr` attributes of drawings and word art. Name default: on, Description default: off.

#### Translate Cached Chart Strings
Exposes pre-rendered chart string values. Default: off.

#### Translate Cached Chart Numbers
Exposes cached chart numbers and format codes. Default: off.

#### Only Included Slide Numbers
Restricts extraction to specific slide numbers. Default: off.

#### Ignore Placeholders in Masters
Prevents placeholder content in masters from being extracted. Default: off.

#### Reorder Options
Multiple reorder options control the ordering of parts within the output ZIP archive:
- **Reorder Notes** — after slide and chart parts
- **Reorder Charts** — after slide/layout/master and diagram parts
- **Reorder Comments** — after slide and note parts
- **Reorder Diagram Data** — after slide/layout/master and relationship parts
- **Reorder Document Properties** — after `_rels/.rels`
- **Reorder Relationships** — after related slide/layout/master
- **Reorder Notes and Comments** — both after slide parts

### Inline Codes

#### Enabled
Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.).

#### Rules
Regex patterns for detecting inline codes within text. Presets available for merge fields (`«FirstName»`) and placeholders (`{name}`).

#### Merge Adjacent
Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder.

#### Move Boundary Codes
Move inline codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton (non-translatable).

## Limitations

- Various known issues tracked in the [Okapi Bitbucket issue tracker](https://bitbucket.org/okapiframework/okapi/issues?status=new&title=~OpenXML).
- Pre-2007 binary Office formats (`.doc`, `.xls`, `.ppt`) are **not** supported.
- PowerPoint comments and document properties extraction is currently coupled with the General Options equivalents.

## Notes

- The highlight-color include/exclude mechanism treats excluded text as hidden, so "Translate Hidden" options can override highlight-based exclusions.
- Starting in 1.48.0, Word highlight color exclusion/inclusion also applies to PowerPoint content.
- Excel worksheet configurations use `java.util.regex.Pattern` syntax for name patterns and ALPHA-26 notation (A, B, C…) for columns.
- Custom Excel exclusion colors can use RGB hex format (`RRGGBB`) via manual config editing.

## Examples

### Excel worksheet with source/target columns

Configure extraction to translate column A into column B, excluding header rows 1-2 and columns C-D:

```
worksheetConfigurations.number.i=1
worksheetConfigurations.0.namePattern=Sheet1
worksheetConfigurations.0.sourceColumns=A
worksheetConfigurations.0.targetColumns=B
worksheetConfigurations.0.excludedRows=1,2
worksheetConfigurations.0.excludedColumns=C,D
```

### Excel worksheet with metadata columns

Translate columns A and B, treat column D as row metadata, rows 1-2 as column headers, exclude row 5 and column C:

```
worksheetConfigurations.number.i=1
worksheetConfigurations.0.namePattern=Sheet1
worksheetConfigurations.0.excludedRows=5
worksheetConfigurations.0.excludedColumns=C
worksheetConfigurations.0.metadataRows=1,2
worksheetConfigurations.0.metadataColumns=D
```

### Excluding custom Excel colors

Exclude Pantone 292 (#69b3e7) by editing the config file:

```
tsExcelExcludedColors.i=1
ccc0=69b3e7
```
